<!--
Thanks for contributing to CORA Vault! Keep the summary tight and tick the
checklist items that apply. See CONTRIBUTING.md for the full workflow.
-->

## What & why

<!-- What does this change, and why? Link any related issue (e.g. Closes #5). -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Script change (`setup.sh` / `scripts/*`)
- [ ] Template structure (`projects/_TEMPLATE`, a new top-level area)
- [ ] Docs (`README.md` / `SETUP.md`)
- [ ] Other

## Checklist

- [ ] **No personal content** — no real names, projects, or private notes; templates stay generic with `*(Fill in)*`-style placeholders.
- [ ] Shell changes pass `shellcheck setup.sh scripts/*.sh` and `bash -n`.
- [ ] If I changed the template structure, I updated `scripts/init-project.sh`, `SETUP.md`, and `README.md` to match.
- [ ] If I changed a file's schema/frontmatter that agents read or write, I noted whether the [CORA plugin](https://github.com/RychidM/cora) needs a matching change.
